title: Obroa-skai information raid

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], [[Scout ship (TIE model)|Imperial scout ships]], directed by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], conducted an information '''raid''' on Obroa-skai's [[Celebratus Archive|extensive library]], in order to uncover the location of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. An [[Elomin task force]], patrolling the system as part of the New Republic's diplomatic efforts to bring [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]] into the Republic, gave chase and followed the scouts into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

{{Battle-stub}}
